name: @inho-team/qe-framework
description: Spec-driven task execution framework for Claude Code and Codex — SVS (Spec-Verify-Supervise) loop with 139 skills and 21 agents

scripts.postinstall: sh -c 'cd / && node --input-type=module -e "const p = process.env.npm_package_json; const { installClaudeAssets, installCodexAssets } = await import(new URL(\"./scripts/lib/client_installers.mjs\", \"file://\" + p)); installClaudeAssets(); installCodexAssets();"'
scripts.preuninstall: sh -c 'cd / && node --input-type=module -e "const p = process.env.npm_package_json; const { uninstallClaudeAssets, uninstallCodexAssets } = await import(new URL(\"./scripts/lib/client_installers.mjs\", \"file://\" + p)); uninstallClaudeAssets(); uninstallCodexAssets();"'
